reference: My mother is undergoing treatment for jaundice, which is due to metastatic breast cancer in the liver. She was administered Pantoprazole, Udiliv, Dextrose five%, Limcee, Econorm, and Loperamide. Now that jaundice has reduced after seven-eight days, she is passing greenish-yellowish and slightly blackish stool very frequently as soon as she eats something. Can you please advise me on the reason and possible treatment?
text: My mother is undergoing treatment for jaundice, which is due to metastatic breast cancer in the liver. She was administered Pantoprazole , Dextrose , Econorm, and Loperamide. Now that jaundice has reduced after seven or eight days, she is passing greenish, yellowish, and slightly blackish stool very quickly as soon as she needs something. Can you please advise me on the reason and possible treatment?
